Checkout session response.description: Endpoint response for a checkout session

amounts.description: Amount for the recurrence, use either minimum and maximum for variable amount recurrences or fixed amount.

maximum.description: Maximum amount for the recurrence, in cents.

minimum.description: Minimum amount for the recurrence, in cents.

periodicity.description: Periodicity for the recurrence, e.g. 'week': every week, 'mnth': every month, 'qurt': every 3 months, 'mian': every 6 months, 'year': every year

allow_other_pix_key.description: Whether other PIX keys are allowed

person_type.description: Type of the person initiating the session

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect after the session

button_label_color.description: Button label color for the session

logo_url.description: URL of the logo to be displayed

navbar_action_color.description: Navbar action color for the session

Checkout session response.title: Checkout session response

Generate a payment initiation.description: Generate a payment initiation for Intranet
Generate a payment initiation.title: Generate a payment initiation

Generate payment initiation response for.description: Generate payment initiation response for external API
Generate payment initiation response for.title: Generate payment initiation response for external API

Itp document response.description: An itp document response for Intranet
Itp document response.title: Itp document response

allow_other_pix_key.description: Whether other PIX keys are allowed

button_label_color.description: Button label color for the session

navbar_action_color.description: Navbar action color for the session

logo_url.description: URL of the logo to be displayed

amount.description: Amount for the transaction. In recurrence sessions, this can be used as the first payment amount

email.description: Email of the sender, also used as pix_key in payin sessions

phone_number.description: Phone number of the sender, also used as pix_key in payin sessions

maximum_amount.description: Maximum amount for the recurrence, in cents.

minimum_amount.description: Minimum amount for the recurrence, in cents.

periodicity.description: Periodicity for the recurrence, e.g. 'week': every week, 'mnth': every month, 'qurt': every 3 months, 'mian': every 6 months, 'year': every year

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect after the session

tax_number.description: Tax number of the sender, also used as pix_key in payin sessions

post.description: Creates a Checkout session API endpoint
